title: Steve
wikitext:
{{Has calculator|Calculator:Slayer/Slayer_task_weight}} {{Otheruses|def=no|Steve on the Pandemonium|'Squawking' Steve Beanie}} {{Infobox NPC |version2 = Slayer guardian |version1 = Slayer master |name = Steve |image2 = [[File:Steve.png|160px]] |image1 = [[File:Steve (Slayer master).png|160px]] |release2 = [[21 January]] [[2016]] |release1 = [[6 May]] [[2016]] |update2 = The Dragon Warhammer |update1 = Monkey Madness II |members = Yes |race = [[Human]] |location2 = [[Asgarnian Ice Dungeon]] |location1 = [[Stronghold Slayer Cave]] entrance |shop2 = No |shop1 = [[Slayer Equipment (shop)|Slayer Equipment]], [[Slayer Rewards]] |gender = Male |options2 = Talk-to |options1 = Talk-to, Assignment, Trade, Rewards |examine2 = He doesn't look very dangerous. |examine1 = He's looking a little more dangerous now. |map2 = {{Map|name=Steve|x=3060|y=9559|r=2|mapID=3|mtype=square}} |map1 = {{Map|name=Steve|x=2432|y=3423|mtype=pin}} |id2 = 6799 |id1 = 6798 |leagueRegion1 = Kandarin |leagueRegion2 = Asgarnia }} [[File:Steve chathead.png|left]] '''Steve''' is a warrior aspiring to become a [[Slayer master]] located by the steps in the upper level of the [[Skeletal Wyvern]] area in the [[Asgarnian Ice Dungeon]]. If players attempt to attack the skeletal wyverns in the upper area, he will stop them from doing so, claiming the upper area is only for those who have skeletal wyverns as a [[Slayer task]]. He wields a [[steel mace]], an [[elemental shield]], and a set of [[Bandos armour]]. After completion of [[Monkey Madness II]], he instead wields a [[Zamorakian hasta]]. Blocking a task with Steve costs 90 [[Slayer reward point|Slayer reward points]]. == Transportation == * The quickest method to obtain an assignment from Steve is to use the [[Lunar spell]] [[NPC Contact]], requiring the completion of [[Lunar Diplomacy]] to cast. * [[Slayer ring]] teleport to the [[Stronghold Slayer Cave]] * [[Spirit tree]] to the Tree Gnome Stronghold and then head south-west * [[Necklace of passage]] teleport to the [[Outpost]], head through the gates of the Tree Gnome Stronghold and then north-west ==Slayer points== Players can receive [[Slayer reward point]]s for completing [[Slayer task]]s—this is based on how many tasks players have accomplished in a row. Completion of a task assigned by Steve will grant you a varying amount of points, depending if players have completed the Elite [[Western Provinces Diary]], which is increased to match those of [[Duradel]]. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" !Task interval !Points given !Points given
(post-[[Western Provinces Diary|Diary]]) |- |Every task |12 |15 |- |Every 10th |60 |75 |- |Every 50th |180 |225 |- |Every 100th |300 |375 |- |Every 250th |420 |525 |- |Every 1,000th |600 |750 |} Steve's blocks cost 90 Slayer points. ==Tasks== {{:Nieve/Slayer assignments}} Note: Steve is a valid contact for the [[NPC Contact]] spell, and you can obtain tasks from them. It is part of the [[Lunar spellbook]]. ===Increased task numbers=== {{Main|Slayer Rewards#Extend}} Unlocking abilities to increase your [[Slayer task|task]] numbers for certain [[Slayer monster]]s can be done by spending [[Slayer reward point]]s from any [[Slayer master]]. == History == === Steve's family === Steve has many cousins, all of whom are [[Slayer guardians]] who operate slayer task only areas, like him. He resides in the [[Asgarnia Ice Dungeon]] and controls the upper level in the [[Skeletal Wyvern]] area until [[Monkey Madness II]] when he is replaced with his little sister [[Pieve]]. [[Slieve]] and [[Eve]] operate out of the [[Taverley Dungeon]], controlling the [[Black dragon|Black]] and [[Blue dragon]] areas, respectively. [[Captain Cleive]] controls access to the [[Lizardman shaman]] slayer caves. [[Lieve McCracken]] oversees [[Kraken Cove]]. [[Hieve]] runs a separate [[metal dragon]] area in the [[Brimhaven Dungeon]], and is the older brother of Pieve and Steve. [[Weve]] guards the [[Wyvern Cave]] for on-task wyverns and [[Ammonite crab|ammonite crabs]] on [[Fossil Island]]. Nieve's uncle [[Breive]] maintains the [[Smoke Devil Dungeon]]. [[Weave]] guards the [[Morytania Spider Cave]] for access to [[Araxyte|araxytes]]. [[Peeve]] guards specific sections of the [[Wilderness Slayer Cave]]. ==== Family tree ==== {{Family tree Nieve}}He is the father of [[Weve]], and brother of [[Hieve]] and [[Pieve]]. His cousin is [[Nieve]], the [[Slayer master]] next to the entrance of the [[Stronghold Slayer Cave]]. He believes that [[Slayer]] masters, and thus Nieve, have nothing special about them, because all they do is "tell people to kill stuff." Through speaking to him, it is clear he is envious of his cousin, due to her having a large cavern where she can "boss people around" (referencing to what happens if players attack a monster within the cave that they're not assigned to kill). Because of this, he decided to carve some steps in the skeletal wyvern area in the Asgarnian Ice Dungeon and claimed the upper area as his own. During the events of [[Monkey Madness II]], when the player recruits Nieve to defend the [[Tree Gnome Stronghold]] from [[Glough]]'s attack, Steve leaves his post to temporarily replace Nieve as the Slayer master. Following her death by [[Glough]], he replaces her as a full-time Slayer master, and has his steel mace replaced by a [[Zamorakian hasta]]. His little sister, [[Pieve]], watches over the extra skeletal wyverns. Talking to him about Nieve's death will result in somewhat humorous dialogue where he was hoping to have a [[Elysian spirit shield|shield]] like hers when he took the job. After Monkey Madness II, Steve can be found next to the Stronghold Slayer Cave. ==Treasure Trails== {{Anagram|Steve|medium|[[Clue scroll (medium) - VESTE|VESTE]]}} The answer to his challenge question: ''How many farming patches are there in Gnome stronghold?'' is '''2'''. ==Dialogue== {{Hastranscript|NPC}} ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 24 March 2016 |update = White & Black Graceful |poll = Old School Content Poll 40: Vanilla LootShare & QoL |change = It is now possible to unlock the possibility of receiving a Lizardmen slayer task from Duradel, Nieve and Chaeldar. Unlocking this task costs 75 slayer points. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ==Trivia== *After completing all of the elite tasks in the [[Western Provinces Diary]], the difference between Steve and [[Duradel]] is that Steve assigns [[brine rat]]s, [[turoth]]s, and [[Scabarites]] and doesn't assign [[waterfiend]]s. {{Slayer Master}} {{Slayer guardians}} {{Asgarnian Ice Dungeon}} {{Tree Gnome Stronghold}} {{NPC Contact}}
